tools.name: search_deals
tools.description: Search deali.co.il's curated catalog of AliExpress deals for Israeli shoppers. Returns matching products with prices in ILS (₪), discount %, rating, and a buy link. Titles and descriptions are in Hebrew - Hebrew queries match best, but English works for brand/model names.

tools.name: get_product
tools.description: Fetch full details for one product by its deali id (e.g. "ali_1005001234567890"): title, Hebrew description, prices in ILS, discount, rating, review/sold counts, image, and buy link.

tools.name: list_blog_posts
tools.description: List deali.co.il's Hebrew blog posts - AliExpress buying guides, product roundups, and shopping tips for Israelis. Returns id, title, excerpt, category, and publish date.

tools.name: get_blog_post
tools.description: Fetch one blog post by id, including its full HTML content (Hebrew).

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_product, list_blog_posts, get_blog_post · Public sink: list_blog_posts, get_blog_post.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_product, list_blog_posts, get_blog_post · Public sink: list_blog_posts, get_blog_post

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
